name: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name
notes: This rule triggers when cryptocurrency mining threats (e.g. virus, malware) are detected. This could indicate a machine infected by a malware or a misuse of a corporate asset.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name Patterns
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name Patterns, BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names
TD_list: APPLY Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name Patterns, BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Names
RED_list: Event name: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name
Event description: A cryptocurrency mining threats (e.g. virus, malware) has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
